summary: Comprehensive testing of 3 new features: text change from 'Kahoot-style' to 'fun style', guide modal implementation, and confetti celebration effect on quiz completion. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ Page title is 'Binance Claw Quiz - Fun Crypto Quizzes'
✅ Homepage shows 'Fun crypto quizzes powered by Binance Academy' (NOT Kahoot-style)
✅ 'How to Play' button present with data-testid='how-to-play-btn'
✅ Guide modal has 3 tabs: Host a Quiz, Join a Game, Solo Mode
✅ Guide modal shows Scoring rules section
✅ Guide modal closes with X button
✅ Confetti celebration effect works on solo quiz completion (visually confirmed)
